title: A to Z My 1st Pet Grooming Carrier Set, 32289
features: Suitable for age 3 years and upwards
Cuddly puppy toy with lots of grooming accessories
Sturdy Carrier with front opening door, flip top and carry handle
description: Product Description This A to Z Pet Grooming Carrier Set contains everything to keep your pet looking adorable. Included in the set is your very own soft and cuddly puppy toy to love and care for. There is a chewy bone and bowl for the puppy, as well as lots of pretend grooming accessories such as scissors, comb and hairdryer. Take your puppy wherever you travel in the sturdy pet carrier. The carrier has a front door, carry handle and flip top to keep your puppy safe.This product conforms to EN71 and the Toy Safety Directive. Please remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 3 years and upwards. Box Contains 1 x Puppy soft toy; 1 x Pet Carrier; 8 x Grooming/Feeding accessories
